subject: Update Danskvand Steps 2-6 with EDA-derived parameters
description: After danskvand_eda_findings.json is generated (Task #3), read the JSON findings and update pre_danskvand_4_engineer_features.py with category-specific parameters: DANSKVAND_LAG_WINDOWS, DANSKVAND_ROLLING_WINDOWS, DANSKVAND_HOLIDAY_MONTHS, MIN_PERIODS. Also check if TRAIN_END/VAL_END in pre_danskvand_5_apply_split.py match EDA findings and update if needed. Re-run the full pipeline (pre_danskvand_2 through pre_danskvand_6) and confirm step_6_log shows same or updated row count. Verify output is consistent with EDA parameters.
